text:
Created attachment 163748
Proposed patch (since 385394 revision)

Patch to update devel/upp port from 8227 to 9251 version.

Look following link for changes:
http://www.ultimatepp.org/www$uppweb$Roadmap$en-us.html

- Add MAKE_JOBS_UNSAFE=yes
- Use new options helpers
- Adapt new changes for *.bm files
- Remove intermediate patches
